title: Poochaandi Paarvayila Lyrics Sattam Oru Iruttarai Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Vijay Antony & Srilekha Parthasarathy
Lyrics : Annamalai
Song: Poochandi Paarvaiyil
Music: Vijay Antony

Un poochaandi paarvayila
aanen Soyin aaney Soyin
un theepatti kannaala naan
aanen doyin.. aaney doyin..

Nee thanganagai mazhigaya ?
unna adagu vaika allaaduren
nee nadamaadum saaraayama ?
unna parthadhumey thallaaduren

Hey iravana vidiyala
vidinjaalum theriyila
kodachal kodupa kanavula

hey veyil soodum theriyala
mazhai penjum nenaiyala
ennaku enna puriyala

Unna thalakaani naan aakuven
unmela thalavachi naan thoonguven
un pinnaala valaatuven
enna sonnaalum thalaiyatuven

hey nee thandha kissula
thallaadum kickula
iravaa pagalaa puriyala

hmm midnight time-ula
minsaara vettula
edhuku enna thaedura..

adi rusiyaana palagaaramey
en pasiyaara nee venumey

nee illaama nodi neramey
ini odaadhu kedikaaramey ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Poochaandi Paarvayila?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the romantic moments between the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of Sattam Oru Iruttarai?

The movie revolves around themes of justice and personal struggles, with the song highlighting the romantic subplot.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Srilekha Parthasarathy and Vijay Antony.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Poochaandi Paarvayila was composed by Vijay Antony.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 23, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poochaandi Paarvayila, the characters express their love and affection through heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes. The song serves as a pivotal moment in Sattam Oru Iruttarai, showcasing the emotional depth of the relationship. With its romantic vibe, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and longing. The collaboration between the singers and the music director adds a unique charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poochaandi Paarvayila from Sattam Oru Iruttarai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of Srilekha Parthasarathy and Vijay Antony, this song creates a magical atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The unique collaboration of heartfelt lyrics by Annamalai and Vijay Antony's captivating music makes this track a must-listen for any music lover.
stanzaMeanings: In your gaze, I became a cat. I became a cat because of your fiery eyes.
Are you a shining star? I won't let you hide, will you dance freely? I won't let go of what I saw.
Hey, even if the dawn breaks, I won't know what to do in my dreams.
Hey, I can't understand the sun's heat, and the rain's thoughts confuse me.
I will become your crown, I will sleep on you, I will grow because of you, no matter what you say, I will not bow down.
Hey, the kiss you gave me has a kick, oh, I can't understand it.
Hmm, at midnight, why am I searching in the dark?
That is a beautiful gift, my dear, you are needed.
Without you, time will not flow, it will not be good anymore.
